title: erigeron rupicola
intro: Erigeron rupicola, also known as mountain fleabane, is a perennial flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving pain. The health benefits of Erigeron rupicola include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and act as an antioxidant. Erigeron rupicola can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal dosages.
